title: Spanish Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish made with saffron-infused rice, chicken, and seafood.
instructions: Heat oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pan.
Add garlic and red bell pepper to pan and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add rice to pan and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add chicken broth, smoked paprika, and saffron to pan. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Add chicken back to pan and cook until heated through.
Stir in artichoke hearts and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
